response.overview: Director's cut of Goodbye My Princess (2019). Xiao Feng, princess of the Western Liang Kingdom, finds herself at the center of a dangerous political conflict when Li Cheng Yin, the youngest Li prince, is sent to assassinate her family and steal her heart. This director's cut features never-before-aired scenes and episodes, adding to the suspense of the original series.
response.title: 东宫
